name: team-partial-failure-test
description: Test that team-wait handles partial failures — one worker succeeds, one is designed to fail

assign.task: Write the word SUCCESS to your output file
This worker is expected to fail

steps.command: echo '## Partial Failure Test' && echo '' && SUMMARY=$(cat .wheel/outputs/failure-test-summary.json 2>/dev/null) && COMPLETED=$(echo "$SUMMARY" | jq -r '.completed_count // 0') && FAILED=$(echo "$SUMMARY" | jq -r '.failed_count // 0') && echo "Completed: $COMPLETED" && echo "Failed: $FAILED" && if [ "$COMPLETED" -ge 1 ] && [ "$FAILED" -ge 1 ]; then echo 'PASS: team-wait correctly reported partial results'; else echo 'FAIL: expected 1 completed + 1 failed'; fi
